Name: postgis_locations
SQL: SELECT coalesce(json_agg("_root"), '[]') AS "_root" FROM (WITH "_root.base" AS (SELECT * FROM "public"."postgis_locations" WHERE ST_DWithin(("public"."postgis_locations"."geom")::geography, ST_GeomFromGeoJSON($1)::geography, $2, $3) AND ST_Equals(("public"."postgis_locations"."geog")::geometry, ST_GeomFromGeoJSON($4)) ORDER BY "name" ASC) SELECT row_to_json((SELECT "_e" FROM (SELECT "_root.base"."name" AS "name") AS "_e")) AS "_root" FROM "_root.base") AS "_root"
